name: Creamy Italian Toss
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare spaghetti according to package directions.
2. Rinse and drain the spaghetti in cold water.
3. In a small bowl, stir together the mayonnaise, wine vinegar, prepared mustard, finely chopped parsley, minced garlic, and 1 1/4 cups of chopped tomatoes.
4. Set aside.
5. In a large bowl, mix together the remaining ingredients: sliced mushrooms, zucchini, pepperoni (8 oz), chopped green pepper, and chopped onion.
6. Add the dressing to the vegetables and toss well to coat.
7. Cover and chill for 2 hours.
4-6 servings
